name: Pentagram ritual (Lesser Banishing Ritual of the Pentagram): the ceremonial magic ritual that establishes sacred space. FSPLIT: the magician draws the pentagrams in the four quarters, splitting mundane space into consecrated ritual space with four elemental guardians. FFUSE: the closing reunites the sacred space with mundane space — the circle is opened, the guardians are released, but the magician retains the charge. VINIT: profane space before the ritual. TANCH: the magic circle. AFWD: invoking pentagram (spirit drawn down). AREV: banishing pentagram (spirit sent away). ENGAGR: the magician stands at the intersection of all four quarters — simultaneously in all elements and none.

phase_0.domain_name: Pentagram ritual (Lesser Banishing Ritual of the Pentagram): the ceremonial magic ritual that establishes sacred space. FSPLIT: the magician draws the pentagrams in the four quarters, splitting mundane space into consecrated ritual space with four elemental guardians. FFUSE: the closing reunites the sacred space with mundane space — the circle is opened, the guardians are released, but the magician retains the charge. VINIT: profane space before the ritual. TANCH: the magic circle. AFWD: invoking pentagram (spirit drawn down). AREV: banishing pentagram (spirit sent away). ENGAGR: the magician stands at the intersection of all four quarters — simultaneously in all elements and none.

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before anything is named or consecrated

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains the whole ritual system

AFWD.justification: forward morphism toward the target (divine descent)

CLINK.chosen_element: sequential tracing of pentagrams in quarters
CLINK.justification: composition of morphisms: each quarter links to the next

IMSCRIB.justification: identity/self-recognition: the magician remains the same self throughout

FSPLIT.chosen_element: drawing the pentagrams in the four quarters
FSPLIT.justification: splits mundane space into consecrated ritual space with four elemental guardians

FFUSE.chosen_element: closing the circle and releasing guardians
FFUSE.justification: reunites sacred space with mundane space; the magician retains the charge

EVALF.justification: negative/failure state: space remains profane or contaminated

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the magician at the intersection of all four quarters
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: simultaneously in all elements and none

IFIX.chosen_element: the ritual record or the magician's retained charge
IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record: the experience is fixed in memory

phase_2.split_element: drawing the pentagrams in the four quarters
phase_2.fuse_element: closing the circle and releasing guardians

phase_3.both_description: the magician simultaneously in all elements and none

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the magician declares intent and self-awareness
Step 2 AREV: banishing pentagram to clear negative influences
Step 3 FSPLIT: drawing pentagrams in four quarters, splitting space
Step 4 AFWD: invoking pentagram to draw down spirit
Step 5 FFUSE: closing the circle, reuniting sacred and mundane
Step 6 CLINK: sequential tracing of pentagrams in order
Step 7 IFIX: recording the ritual in memory or journal
Step 8 IMSCRIB: final self-recognition and grounding

phase_5.memory_mechanism: the magician's experiential memory and ritual record
phase_5.alfs_store: the Golden Dawn tradition or grimoire

phase_6.cycle_cost: the magician's focused attention and energy
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle conserves energy; charge is retained, not lost
